name: French Meatball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add rice to 1 cup of water. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes; drain well.
2. Combine the ground beef, egg, onion, garlic, parsley, and nutmeg. Form into small meatballs.
3. Pour dry red wine into the beef broth and bring to a boil.
4. Drop the meatballs into the hot broth one at a time. Return to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Microwave method: Add rice to 1 cup of salted water. Bring to a boil, then hold for 5 minutes; drain well.
7. Combine meatball ingredients as described above.
8. Pour the wine into the broth and bring to a boil.
9. Drop the meatballs into the hot broth one at a time. Return to a boil.
10. Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
